default.description: Default capability set for the HQ Sync menubar webview.

desktop-alt-capability.description: Capability set for the Indigo-only desktop alternate UX window. The Meetings page self-fetches calendar data via the app's meetings_* commands directly (meetings_list_upcoming, meetings_list_scheduled_bots, meetings_list_accounts, meetings_list_calendars_for_account, meetings_list_memberships) — same as the standalone meetings-window. The Projects surface self-fetches local-PRD data via get_local_projects and get_local_project_prd (US-003, local HQ-tree reader with vault fallback), plus get_local_project_readme (US-009, reads a project's sibling README.md by its prd path with the same path-traversal guard) and get_local_company_goals (reads a company's objectives + initiatives from companies/<slug>/board.json with the same slug/path guard; missing board → empty goals), and persists status changes via set_local_project_status (US-010, atomic + round-trip-validated write to companies/*/board.json) and set_local_story_passes (US-010, atomic toggle of a story's passes in the project's prd.json) — both reuse the same is_within HQ-folder path guard and the Indigo gate. These are app-registered Tauri commands authorized by core:default (custom commands are not gated by per-command permission identifiers in this ACL, only plugins are), so no allow-* tokens exist or are added for them.

dm-banner.description: Capability set for the dm-banner custom notification window. Receives the DM payload via IPC (core:event) and invokes banner_window_ready (ready-handshake show), banner_action (re-emit notification:dm-action → App.svelte opens detail / copies prompt), and dismiss_banner (auto-timeout / close). Without this file the banner's invoke()/listen calls silently fail the capability check and the window (created visible:false, shown only by the handshake) never appears. Mirrors dm-detail.json.

dm-detail.description: Capability set for the dm-detail secondary window. Receives the DM event via IPC (core:event) and invokes the dm_detail_window_ready handshake + show/focus. Without this file the window's invoke()/listen calls silently fail the capability check, so dm_detail_window_ready never reaches Rust and the window (created visible:false, shown only by the handshake) never appears — the symptom is clicking 'Open details' on a DM notification doing nothing. Mirrors share-detail.json.

drift-detail.description: Capability set for the drift-detail secondary window. Needs event IPC to receive the DriftReport from Rust + permission to invoke the handshake / restore commands. Without this file, invoke() calls from the window silently fail at the capability check — the symptom is a window that stays stuck on its loading state because drift_window_ready never reaches Rust.

meeting-permissions.description: Capability set for the meeting-permissions wizard window. Self-fetches state via `meetings_permissions_state` and deep-links to System Settings panes via `permissions_open_settings` — no event-handshake needed.

meetings-window.description: Capability set for the Upcoming Meetings detail window. Needs to invoke meetings_* commands directly (self-fetches data, no main-window handshake).

new-files-detail.description: Capability set for the new-files detail window. Only needs event IPC to receive file list data from the main window.

notification-history.description: Capability set for the notification-history secondary window. Invokes fetch_notification_history + get_activity_log to load the unified timeline, and open_dm_detail / open_share_detail for per-row click-through. Without this file the window's invoke() calls silently fail the capability check and the window renders empty. Mirrors dm-detail.json.

packages-capability.description: Capability set for the Packages window. It self-fetches via the app-registered packages_* commands (list_packages, check_package_updates, install_package, update_package, uninstall_package, packages_window_ready) — authorized by core:default (custom commands are not gated by per-command permission identifiers, only plugins are). shell:allow-open lets pack descriptions link out.

share-detail.description: Capability set for the share-detail window. Receives event list via IPC; uses window.open() (Web API, no shell plugin needed) for the HQ Console link.
